Notes.Text:
This update for libqt4 fixes the following issue

- CVE-2025-14575: local user can load rogue CA certificates as trusted system authority via a crafted file placed in the
  application's working directory (bsc#1265896).

Vulnerabilities.Description: An Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in the OpenSSL TLS backend of Qt Network (qtbase) in Qt Qt Framework (Unix) allows a local attacker to load a rogue CA certificate as a trusted system authority via a crafted certificate file placed in the application's working directory.
